message:
feat(sql): add vector type support to compiled execution

Add vec_f32 and vec_f64 support to the compiled execution path:
- Add vector variants to ColumnDataPtr union with rawPtr/len methods
- Update allocateColumnBuffer/freeColumnBuffer for vector types
- Update loadColumnDataForLayout to read vector columns
- Update extractResultData to convert vector data to results
- Fix double-free bugs in executeCompiled (JitContext/source cleanup)
- Fix toZigType() for unknown type (return f64 instead of anytype)
- Fix Zig 0.15 stderr reading API in JIT compiler
